title: Keto Intensely Flavored Syrian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty, keto-friendly tagine recipe from Syria, flavored with intense spices and served with a side of cauliflower rice.
instructions: 1. Heat the intensely flavored olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium and add the chopped onion to the pot.
5. Cook the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
6. Add the minced garlic, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
8. Add the dried apricots and sliced almonds to the pot.
9. Return the lamb to the pot and cover with a lid.
10. Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
11. Serve the lamb with the sauce spooned over the top, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
